Bash(psql -U postgres -d launchforge_db -h localhost -c 'INSERT INTO users \(email, password\) VALUES \('\\''second@user.com'\\'', '\\''$2b$10$pI2lIa2/DwCDKctZjel.kuKGhLtYEzUlojKXX6.Y9J76aI.6iAYoC'\\''\);')

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000/api/login -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"second@user.com","password":"wrongpass"}' -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "Body: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { "Status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.Value__\)"; $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); "Body: $\($reader.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" })

PowerShell(node -e "const http=require\('http'\);function post\(p,b\){return new Promise\(r=>{const d=JSON.stringify\(b\);const q=http.request\({hostname:'localhost',port:3000,path:p,method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Content-Length':d.length}},s=>{let x='';s.on\('data',c=>x+=c\);s.on\('end',\(\)=>r\({status:s.statusCode,body:JSON.parse\(x\)}\)\)}\);q.write\(d\);q.end\(\)}\)}\(async\(\)=>{await post\('/api/register',{email:'selfadmin@test.com',password:'admin123'}\);await post\('/api/register',{email:'selfuser@test.com',password:'user1234'}\);console.log\('registered'\)}\)\(\);")
